title: The Key to Loki’s Chains
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Brook, Unknown person #5, Loki, Nami, Usopp as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This place is covered with giant skeletons!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The castle once had numerous guards.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On that day, around a hundred of them...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...stood ready to kill luki, but only one survived!!! Lord JARUL!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: After that tragedy happened here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...Coming to this site was forbidden!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's a Den for vengeful spirits!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, guys!! Look over here!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: This skull is enormous!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's also got horns!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These belonged to someone with "ancient giant warrior" blood.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are no longer any pure blooded members of that clan, but their blood still flows in some of us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I wonder if he knew OARS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like King Harald, who was larger and stronger than most...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oh!! Look above you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How nostalgic...

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: That's a portrait of King Harald!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The man who tried to form peaceful bonds with the outside world.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: said to be Elbaf's strongest king.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He sure looks strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Those scars on his head...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...Mark where his ancient giant horns were...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...before he ripped them out.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: He believed the ancient giants...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...were relics from a war-torn era!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He had horns?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What conviction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After the king's death, the country fell into despair...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sadly, the one with the biggest grudge against LOKi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: was naturally King Harold's other son, Rajrudin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Woah!! Seriously?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He's LOKi's brother?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They have different mothers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before marrying the Queen, Rajrudin was born to a different woman...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: However, Elbaf would never...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...have recognized Hajrudin's mother as its queen in any case.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She was born in a different giant country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What does that matter? They were both giants, right?!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
